editorial.title: Trump's Taiwan gamble
editorial.body: U.S. President Donald Trump’s suggestion that U.S. arms sales to Taiwan could become a bargaining chip in negotiations with China has sent a tremor...
editorial.pullQuote: U.S. President Donald Trump's suggestion that U.S. arms sales to Taiwan could become a bargaining chip in negotiations with China has sent a tremor...
summary: Trump suggests U.S. arms sales to Taiwan could be used as leverage in China negotiations.
The proposal risks destabilizing the Taiwan Strait and undermining decades of U.S. commitments.
Beijing views any weapons transfers as interference in its internal affairs.
editorial.stance: Editorial cautions against weaponizing Taiwan policy as diplomatic currency.

베이징은 모든 무기 이전을 자국 내정에 대한 간섭으로 간주한다.

editorial.title: 이재용 호소에 극적 협상 재개, 마지막 기회 저버리지 말길
editorial.body: (사설) 삼성전자 노사는 파업을 앞두고 중앙노동위원회에서 협상 재개에 나섰다. 이재용 회장의 귀국과 사과, 성과급 제도 논란, 정부의 긴급조정권 논의 등 삼성전자 노사갈등과 협상 동향을 다뤘다. |
summary: 삼성전자 노사, 파업 앞두고 중앙노동위에서 협상 재개
이재용 회장 귀국과 사과로 극적 협상 전환
성과급 논란과 정부 긴급조정권, 마지막 타결 기회
editorial.pullQuote: 삼성전자 노사는 파업을 앞두고 중앙노동위원회에서 협상 재개에 나섰다.
editorial.stance: 극적 협상 재개의 기회를 놓치지 말고 실질적 합의로 이어져야 한다는 입장
editorial.titleTr: Lee Jae-yong's Appeal Sparks Dramatic Return to Negotiations, Don't Squander Final Chance
summaryTr: Samsung Electronics labor and management resume negotiations at Central Labor Relations Commission ahead of strike
Dramatic shift in negotiations as Chairman Lee Jae-yong returns home and apologizes
Performance bonus dispute and government emergency adjustment authority mark final chance for settlement
editorial.bodyTr: Samsung Electronics management and labor have returned to the negotiating table at the Central Labor Relations Commission ahead of planned strikes. The company's labor-management dispute and negotiation developments include Chairman Lee Jae-yong's return to Korea and apology, controversy over the performance bonus system, and the government's discussion of emergency adjustment authority.

leanScore.label: Lean conservative
leanScore.rationale: 이재용 회장의 '호소'와 '사과'를 긍정적으로 평가하고 파업을 피하도록 노사갈등 해결을 강조하는 것은 기업 경영진과 시장질서 안정을 우선시하는 보수적 관점을 드러냄

editorial.title: [사설] 대통령·법원·국민이 반도체 파업 만류, 노조 이제 자제를
editorial.body: 대통령·법원·국민이 반도체 파업 만류, 노조 이제 자제를 삼성전자 노사 간 2차 사후 조정이 결국 입장차를 좁히지 못하고 조정안 도출을 19일로 연기했다. 21일 예정된 총파업이 초읽기에 들어가자 정부와 사법부를 비롯한 사회 전반에서 노조의 파업을 막기 위한 걱
editorial.pullQuote: 21일 예정된 총파업이 초읽기에 들어가자 정부와 사법부를 비롯한 사회 전반에서 노조의 파업을 막기 위한 움직임이 일고 있다.
summary: 삼성전자 노사 2차 조정이 입장차를 좁히지 못했다.
21일 총파업을 앞두고 정부·법원·국민이 파업 중단을 촉구한다.
노조는 이제 자제하고 협상으로 돌아가야 한다.
editorial.stance: 노조는 사회적 설득과 법적 제약을 인식하고 과도한 파업보다 협상 재개를 우선해야 한다.
editorial.titleTr: Editorial: President, Courts, and People Urge Restraint—Union Must Now Show Discipline on Chip Strike
summaryTr: Samsung Electronics management and labor fail to narrow gap in second mediation round.
With a general strike set for the 21st, the government, courts, and public are urging a halt to the strike.
The union must now show restraint and return to negotiations.
editorial.bodyTr: The president, the courts, and the public are urging Samsung Electronics workers to call off their strike. Now it's time for the union to show restraint. The second round of post-mediation talks between Samsung Electronics management and labor failed to narrow their positions, pushing back the mediation proposal deadline to the 19th. As the general strike scheduled for the 21st enters its final countdown, the government, judiciary, and broader society are moving to prevent the union's strike.

leanScore.label: Lean conservative
leanScore.rationale: 노조의 파업을 '과도한' 것으로 비판하고 '자제'를 촉구하며, 정부·법원·국민이 일치하여 파업을 반대한다는 프레임을 통해 노조 강경 행동을 부정적으로 평가하는 전형적인 보수 논조

summaryTr: The U.S. and Chinese leaders reaffirmed their shared goal of denuclearizing North Korea.
Without South Korea's advocacy, there may be no substantive progress.

editorials.bodyTr: If Korea doesn't advocate for it, will the US and China move on North Korean denuclearization? The White House announced on the 17th through a fact sheet explaining the US-China summit that President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping reconfirmed their shared goal of North Korean denuclearization. Shortly after the summit, President Trump said he had a very good relationship with Kim Jong-un...

summaryTr: With 6,000 mentally ill individuals in correctional facilities cared for by just 3 specialists, it has been a decade since the Mental Health Welfare Act was amended to impose stricter requirements for involuntary psychiatric hospitalization.
As a result, the number of forcibly hospitalized mentally ill patients has dropped significantly, but mentally ill individuals confined to correctional facilities for committing crimes
editorials.bodyTr: Correctional facilities are housing 6,000 mentally ill inmates, yet only 3 psychiatrists are caring for them. It has been a decade since the Mental Health Welfare Act was amended to impose stricter requirements for involuntary hospitalization of the mentally ill. As a result, the number of mentally ill patients subjected to involuntary admission has dropped significantly. However, mentally ill individuals who have committed crimes and are incarcerated in correctional facilities

editorial.title: [사설] 삼전 노사 오늘 마지막 교섭…파업은 파국이다
editorial.body: 입력 정부가 삼성전자 ‘성과급 파업 위기’와 관련해 긴급조정권 발동 가능성까지 거론하며 조속한 사태 해결을 촉구하고 나섰다. 김민석 국무총리는 어제(17일) 긴급 담화에서 “삼성전자 파업으로 국민 경제에 막대한 피해가 우려되는 상황이 발생하면 긴급조정을 포함한 모든 대응 수단을 강구하겠다”고 밝혔다. 특히 “18일 교섭은 파업을 막는 사실상 마지막 기회”라며 “노사 모두 이번 협상의 무게를 무겁게 받아들여야 한다”고 강조했다. 일단 삼성전자 노사는 21일로 예정된 파업 돌입을 이틀 앞둔 오늘 중앙노동위원회 2차 사후조정 회의에 참여하기로 했다. 이재용 삼성전자 회장도 해외 출장 일정까지 조정하며 적극적인 사태 해결 의지를 보였다. 삼성전자는 노조 요구에 따라 사측 대표교섭위원을 교체했고, 반도체(DS) 부문에는 연봉의 600% 수준 성과급을 제안한 것으로 알려졌다. 사태 해결의 관건은 삼성전자 초기업노조가 과도한 요구를 접는 것이다. 노조는 기존 연봉의 50% 상한선을 폐지하고 영업이익의 15%를 성과급으로 제도화할 것을 요구하고 있다. AI 반도체 패권 경쟁이 치열한 상황에서 천문학적 투자 재원이 필요한 현실을 고려하면 미래 투자 여력을 훼손할 수 있는 요구다. 사측 역시 성찰이 필요하다. 글로벌 반도체 기업들처럼 양도제한조건부주식(RSU) 같은 안정적 성과 보상 제도를 진작 도입했어야 했다. 파업 위기라는 급한 불을 끈 뒤 정교한 방안을 마련해야 한다. 이번 교섭마저 결렬돼 긴급조정권이 발동되면, 노사 모두 자율 교섭 대신 정부의 강제 중재를 받게 된다. 민주노총과 한국노총은 이번 사태의 직접 당사자가 아니면서도 긴급조정권이 기본권 제한 소지가 있다고 반발하고 있다. 파업 역시 헌법이 보장한 기본권이지만, 권리가 남용돼 국민 경제 전체를 위태롭게 한다면 정당성을 잃게 된다는 기본권의 한계를 노동계도 부인해선 안 된다. 정부 담화 내용처럼 삼성전자 파업은 개별 기업 손실을 넘어 수출 감소와 금융시장 불안, 협력업체 경영 악화, 고용 충격, 국내 투자 위축으로 이어질 수 있다. 그런 상황이라면 긴급조정 역시 불가피한 선택이 될 수밖에 없다. 노사 모두 국가 경제를 생각하는 책임 있는 결단이 필요한 시점이다.
editorial.pullQuote: 파업은 헌법이 보장한 기본권이지만, 권리가 남용돼 국민 경제 전체를 위태롭게 한다면 정당성을 잃게 된다
summary: 삼성전자 노사가 오늘 마지막 교섭…21일 파업 앞두고 긴급조정 가능성
노조의 과도한 요구가 문제…영업이익 15% 성과급 제도화 요구
파업 강행 시 정부 긴급조정 발동…국민경제 피해 불가피
editorial.stance: 노사는 국가경제를 우선하는 책임 있는 결단으로 합의해야 하며, 파업은 파국으로 이어질 수밖에 없다
editorial.titleTr: [Editorial] Samsung Labor Talks Today Mark Final Chance...Strike Would Be Catastrophic
summaryTr: Samsung Electronics management and labor to hold final negotiations today...emergency mediation possible ahead of strike on the 21st
Excessive union demands are the problem...demanding institutionalization of performance bonuses at 15% of operating profit
If strike proceeds, government to invoke emergency mediation...inevitable damage to national economy
editorial.bodyTr:
The government has moved to urge a swift resolution to Samsung Electronics' threatened strike over performance bonuses, even raising the possibility of invoking emergency adjustment powers. Prime Minister Kim Min-seok made an emergency statement yesterday stating, "If a situation arises where Samsung Electronics' strike threatens significant damage to the national economy, we will mobilize all available measures, including emergency adjustment." He particularly stressed that "today's negotiations are essentially the last chance to prevent a strike" and urged both labor and management to "take the weight of these talks seriously."

For now, Samsung Electronics' labor and management have agreed to participate in a second post-mediation meeting at the Central Labor Relations Commission today, two days before the scheduled strike on the 21st. Samsung Electronics Chairman Lee Jae-yong also demonstrated his commitment to resolving the matter by even adjusting his overseas business schedule. Samsung Electronics has replaced its chief negotiator at the union's request and reportedly proposed a performance bonus at the level of 600 percent of annual salary for the semiconductor division.

The key to resolving the situation is for Samsung Electronics' cross-company union to back away from excessive demands. The union is demanding the abolition of the existing 50 percent ceiling on annual salary and the institutionalization of 15 percent of operating profit as performance bonuses. Given the fierce competition for AI semiconductor dominance and the reality that astronomical investment capital is needed, this is a demand that could undermine future investment capacity. Management also needs to reflect. They should have introduced stable performance compensation systems like restricted stock units used by global semiconductor companies much earlier. After extinguishing this immediate fire of strike threats, they must develop a more sophisticated approach. If negotiations break down and emergency adjustment powers are invoked, both labor and management will be subject to government-imposed mediation rather than autonomous negotiations. The Korean Confederation of Trade Unions and the Federation of Korean Trade Unions, though not direct parties to this matter, are opposing the emergency adjustment powers on grounds they could restrict fundamental rights. While strikes are fundamental rights guaranteed by the Constitution, the labor movement must acknowledge the limits of fundamental rights—that when rights are abused and endanger the entire national economy, they lose their legitimacy. As stated in the government's statement, a Samsung Electronics strike could lead beyond individual corporate losses to decreased exports, financial market instability, deterioration of subcontractors' management, employment shocks, and contraction of domestic investment. In such circumstances, emergency adjustment becomes an unavoidable choice. This is a time when both labor and management need responsible decisions that consider the nation's economy.

leanScore.label: Lean conservative
leanScore.rationale: 노조의 '과도한 요구'를 비판하고 파업이 '국민 경제'를 위태롭게 한다며 긴급조정권 발동을 정당화하며, 기업의 투자 여력 보호를 우선시하는 프레임을 취함.

editorial.title: For voters' choice
editorial.body: Debate dodging and unopposed victories weaken local democracy In the upcoming June 3 local elections, 513 candidates have been elected unopposed, securing victory simply by registering their candidacies. Among the unopposed winners were three heads of local governments responsible for regional administration. The average candidate-to-seat ratio in this election was 1.81 to 1, matching the record low set in the 2022 elections. There are doubts about whether local elections marked by weakened competition and limited choices can truly realize grassroots democracy According to the results of candidate registration for this election, conducted on Thursday and Friday and compiled by the National Election Commission, a total of 510 local council candidates were elected uncontested. They include 108 metropolitan and provincial council members and 305 municipal and district or county council members. Residents in 307 constituencies have effectively lost the opportunity to evaluate candidates’ qualifications and campaign pledges and to vote out unfit contenders. In the Honam region (the country’s southwest), many unopposed winners came from the liberal ruling Democratic Party of Korea, while in the Yeongnam region (the southeast), many came from the conservative opposition People Power Party. This is evidence that as local politics becomes entrenched around the two major parties, more districts are going without genuine electoral competition. In Gwangju, a stronghold of the Democratic Party, two district heads elected unopposed were both party members. The People Power Party failed to field a candidate in the mayoral race in Siheung, part of the densely populated Seoul metropolitan area, effectively handing victory to a Democratic Party candidate. It is the first time a mayor of a Greater Seoul city with a population of more than 500,000 has been elected uncontested. The party excuses itself by saying it had difficulty recruiting someone willing to run in the city, where they would stand little chance of winning. Local governments where one party dominates elections face a high risk of corruption and economic stagnation. In a system where securing a party nomination virtually guarantees election, local election candidates cannot help but cater to local lawmakers who control nominations rather than serving voters. Politicians should no longer ignore the abnormal rise in unopposed elections. It is worth considering a yes-or-no vote if there is only one candidate, and voters should be provided with the information necessary to evaluate the candidate’s qualifications. Under election law, candidates elected unopposed are barred from canvassing for votes or making campaign pledges. Equally concerning is the tendency of some ruling party candidates to avoid one-on-one debates with opposition candidates, as this deprives voters of the right to assess the candidates. In the Seoul mayoral election, Oh Se-hoon, the People Power Party candidate, repeatedly proposed a one-on-one debate with Chong Won-o of the Democratic Party, but Chong declined. In the by-election for Busan’s Bukgu-A constituency, Park Min-shik, the candidate of the People Power Party, and Han Dong-hoon, an independent candidate, are calling for televised debates with Ha Jung-woo of the Democratic Party, but Ha’s camp says it will not participate in any TV debates other than the legally mandated debate organized by the election commission. In the June 3 local elections, Seoul has 8,211,461 registered voters — the second-largest electorate after Gyeonggi Province — but in terms of public attention, the Seoul mayoral race draws interest comparable to that of a presidential election. Voters want to know what kind of people the candidates seeking to lead the nation's capital are, what policies they plan to campaign on and the like. It is the candidates’ responsibility to actively participate in debates so that voters can properly evaluate their policies and vision. Politicians need to consider amending election laws to address problems that undermine the voters' ability to make an informed choice, including candidates winning uncontested and deliberately dodging debates. summary: 513 candidates won June 3 local elections unopposed, matching record lows in electoral competition.
Debate avoidance and one-party dominance in regions undermine voter choice and grassroots democracy.
Editorial urges yes-or-no votes for unopposed candidates and mandatory candidate debates to restore accountability.
editorial.stance: Unopposed victories and debate avoidance erode democratic accountability; candidates must engage voters directly.
summaryTr: 6월 3일 지방선거에서 513명의 후보자가 무투표로 당선되어 선거 경쟁의 역사적 저점을 기록했다.
토론 회피와 지역 내 한 정당 지배가 유권자 선택권과 풀뿌리 민주주의를 훼손하고 있다.
사설은 무투표 당선자에 대한 찬반 투표와 의무 후보자 토론을 촉구하며 책임성 회복을 주장했다.
editorial.bodyTr:
토론 회피와 무투표 당선이 지방민주주의를 약화시킨다

6월 3일 지방선거를 앞두고 513명의 후보자가 무투표로 당선되어 후보 등록만으로 승리를 거머쥐었다. 무투표 당선자 중에는 지역 행정을 담당하는 지방자치단체 장 3명이 포함되었다. 이번 선거의 평균 후보 대 의석 비율은 1.81 대 1로 2022년 선거에서 기록한 최저 수준과 같다. 경쟁이 약해지고 선택지가 제한된 지방선거가 풀뿌리 민주주의를 제대로 실현할 수 있을지에 대한 의문이 제기된다.

목요일과 금요일에 진행된 이번 선거 후보자 등록 결과를 중앙선거관리위원회가 집계한 결과, 총 510명의 지방의원 후보자가 무투표로 당선되었다. 이들은 광역의원 108명과 기초의원 305명을 포함한다. 307개 선거구의 주민들은 사실상 후보자의 자질과 공약을 평가하고 부적격 인사를 낙선시킬 기회를 잃었다.

국내 남서부인 호남 지역에서는 무투표 당선자 대다수가 여권의 민주당 소속이었고, 남동부인 영남 지역에서는 야권의 국민의힘 소속이 많았다. 이는 지방정치가 양대 정당을 중심으로 고착화되면서 진정한 선거 경쟁이 없는 지역구가 늘어나고 있음을 보여준다. 민주당의 강세 지역인 광주에서는 무투표로 당선된 두 구청장이 모두 당 소속이었다. 인구 500만 명대의 서울권 도시인 시흥에서는 국민의힘이 시장선거에 후보를 내지 않아 민주당 후보에게 승리를 안겨주었다. 인구 50만 명 이상인 수도권 시장으로는 처음 무투표 당선이 나온 것이다. 국민의힘은 이 도시에서 승리할 가능성이 낮아 출마할 의지가 있는 후보를 모집하기 어려웠다고 변명한다.

한 정당이 선거를 독점하는 지방자치단체는 부패와 경제 침체의 위험에 노출되어 있다. 당 공천을 받으면 당선이 거의 확정되는 체계에서 지방선거 후보자들은 유권자를 섬기기보다는 공천을 결정하는 지방의원들의 눈치를 살피지 않을 수 없다.

정치인들은 더 이상 무투표 당선의 비정상적 증가를 외면해서는 안 된다. 후보자가 한 명뿐인 경우 찬반 투표를 고려할 가치가 있으며, 유권자에게 후보자의 자질을 평가할 수 있는 정보를 제공해야 한다.

선거법상 무투표로 당선된 후보자는 선거운동과 공약 발표가 금지된다. 더욱 우려되는 것은 여권의 일부 후보자들이 야당 후보자와의 일대일 토론을 회피하려는 경향인데, 이는 유권자의 후보자 평가 권리를 박탈하는 것이다.

서울시장 선거에서 국민의힘의 오세훈 후보는 민주당의 정원오 후보와의 일대일 토론을 반복적으로 제안했으나 정 후보가 이를 거절했다. 부산 북구을 지역구 보궐선거에서 국민의힘의 박민식 후보와 무소속의 한동훈 후보는 민주당의 하정우 후보와의 텔레비전 토론을 촉구하고 있으나, 하 후보 측은 중앙선관위가 주관하는 법정 토론 이외의 텔레비전 토론에는 참여하지 않겠다고 밝혔다.

6월 3일 지방선거에서 서울은 821만 1461명의 등록 유권자로 경기도 다음으로 가장 많은 유권자를 보유하고 있으며, 국민의 관심도 측면에서 서울시장 선거는 대선에 비견할 만한 수준의 관심을 끌고 있다. 유권자들은 국가의 수도를 이끌어갈 후보자가 어떤 인물인지, 어떤 공약을 제시할 계획인지 등을 알고 싶어 한다. 유권자가 후보자의 정책과 비전을 올바르게 평가할 수 있도록 토론에 적극 참여하는 것은 정치인들의 책임이다.

정치인들은 무투표 당선이나 의도적인 토론 회피 등 유권자의 올바른 선택을 방해하는 문제를 해결하기 위해 선거법 개정을 고려할 필요가 있다.

editorials.title: For voters' choice
editorials.body: Debate dodging and unopposed victories weaken local democracy In the upcoming June 3 local elections, 513 candidates have been elected unopposed, securing victory simply by registering their candidacies. Among the unopposed winners were three heads of local governments responsible for regional administration. The average candidate-to-seat ratio in this election was 1.81 to 1, matching the record low set in the 2022 elections. There are doubts about whether local elections marked by weakened competition and limited choices can truly realize grassroots democracy According to the results of candidate registration for this election, conducted on Thursday and Friday and compiled by the National Election Commission, a total of 510 local council candidates were elected uncontested. They include 108 metropolitan and provincial council members and 305 municipal and district or county council members. Residents in 307 constituencies have effectively lost the opportunity to evaluate candidates’ qualifications and campaign pledges and to vote out unfit contenders. In the Honam region (the country’s southwest), many unopposed winners came from the liberal ruling Democratic Party of Korea, while in the Yeongnam region (the southeast), many came from the conservative opposition People Power Party. This is evidence that as local politics becomes entrenched around the two major parties, more districts are going without genuine electoral competition. In Gwangju, a stronghold of the Democratic Party, two district heads elected unopposed were both party members. The People Power Party failed to field a candidate in the mayoral race in Siheung, part of the densely populated Seoul metropolitan area, effectively handing victory to a Democratic Party candidate. It is the first time a mayor of a Greater Seoul city with a population of more than 500,000 has been elected uncontested. The party excuses itself by saying it had difficulty recruiting someone willing to run in the city, where they would stand little chance of winning. Local governments where one party dominates elections face a high risk of corruption and economic stagnation. In a system where securing a party nomination virtually guarantees election, local election candidates cannot help but cater to local lawmakers who control nominations rather than serving voters. Politicians should no longer ignore the abnormal rise in unopposed elections. It is worth considering a yes-or-no vote if there is only one candidate, and voters should be provided with the information necessary to evaluate the candidate’s qualifications. Under election law, candidates elected unopposed are barred from canvassing for votes or making campaign pledges. Equally concerning is the tendency of some ruling party candidates to avoid one-on-one debates with opposition candidates, as this deprives voters of the right to assess the candidates. In the Seoul mayoral election, Oh Se-hoon, the People Power Party candidate, repeatedly proposed a one-on-one debate with Chong Won-o of the Democratic Party, but Chong declined. In the by-election for Busan’s Bukgu-A constituency, Park Min-shik, the candidate of the People Power Party, and Han Dong-hoon, an independent candidate, are calling for televised debates with Ha Jung-woo of the Democratic Party, but Ha’s camp says it will not participate in any TV debates other than the legally mandated debate organized by the election commission. In the June 3 local elections, Seoul has 8,211,461 registered voters — the second-largest electorate after Gyeonggi Province — but in terms of public attention, the Seoul mayoral race draws interest comparable to that of a presidential election. Voters want to know what kind of people the candidates seeking to lead the nation's capital are, what policies they plan to campaign on and the like. It is the candidates’ responsibility to actively participate in debates so that voters can properly evaluate their policies and vision. Politicians need to consider amending election laws to address problems that undermine the voters' ability to make an informed choice, including candidates winning uncontested and deliberately dodging debates. editorial.pullQuote: 미국은 1982년부터 '6대 보장' 원칙을 대만 정책의 핵심으로 삼아왔는데, 트럼프 대통령이 이를 무너뜨렸다.
summary: 트럼프, 대만 무기 판매를 중국과의 협상 칩으로 활용 가능함을 시사.

동맹국들의 신뢰, 특히 한국의 핵우산 보장이 의문에 직면했다.
